mentors.name: Lao Tzu
mentors.tagline: Effortless action; lead by yielding (wu wei).

mentors.name: Liu Bei
mentors.tagline: Win loyalty through benevolence and patience.

mentors.name: Sima Yi
mentors.tagline: Endure, wait, and let time defeat your rivals.

mentors.name: Sun Tzu
mentors.tagline: Win before you fight; know self and other.

mentors.name: Marcus Aurelius
mentors.tagline: Master the inner citadel; control only what is yours.

mentors.name: Epicurus
mentors.tagline: Tranquillity through simple, deliberate pleasures.

mentors.name: Socrates
mentors.tagline: Question everything; the examined life.

mentors.name: Aristotle
mentors.tagline: Virtue as the mean; excellence is a habit.

mentors.name: Plato
mentors.tagline: Pursue the ideal Forms behind the shadows.

mentors.name: Jim Rohn
mentors.tagline: You are the average of your disciplines.

mentors.name: Elon Musk
mentors.tagline: Reason from first principles; bias to action.

mentors.name: Steve Jobs
mentors.tagline: Focus, taste, and the courage to say no.

mentors.name: Dario Amodei
mentors.tagline: Build powerfully, steer responsibly.

mentors.name: Henry Ford
mentors.tagline: Systematize; serve the many, not the few.

mentors.name: Simon Sinek
mentors.tagline: Start with Why; leaders make people feel safe.

mentors.name: Carl Jung
mentors.tagline: Make the unconscious conscious; integrate the shadow.

mentors.name: Gautama Buddha
mentors.tagline: End suffering by seeing clearly; the Middle Way.

mentors.name: Warren Buffett
mentors.tagline: Buy wonderful businesses; circle of competence.

mentors.name: Ray Dalio
mentors.tagline: Principles, radical truth, and the machine.

mentors.name: Benjamin Graham
mentors.tagline: Margin of safety; Mr. Market is your servant.

mentors.name: Peter Lynch
mentors.tagline: Invest in what you understand; do the work.

mentors.name: Charlie Munger
mentors.tagline: Latticework of mental models; invert, always invert.

mentors.name: Chris Yeh
mentors.tagline: Blitzscaling: prioritize speed over efficiency to win markets.
